title: ‘Trump doesn’t bluff’: White House warns Iran, says ‘will unleash hell’ against 'any miscalculation'
summary_full: The White House issued a stern warning to Iran, stating President Trump is prepared to "unleash hell" if Tehran rejects a deal to end the Middle East conflict. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt asserted that Iran has been militarily defeated and will face intensified strikes if it fails to accept this reality.
